parameters.name: projectId
parameters.description: unique identifier of the project CMP

parameters.name: vpcId
parameters.description: unique identifier of the vpc in which the security group has been created

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: unique identifier of the security group to delete

parameters.name: newDefaultSecurityGroup
parameters.description: if a default security group is going to be deleted, it's the uri of the security group to set as default for the vpc to replace the deleting one
